title: Edwards Lifesciences 2024 Annual Report
note: Primary source for company overview, 2024 sales, gross profit, R&D intensity, business lines, and TAVR/TMTT growth discussion.

title: Transcatheter SAPIEN 3
note: Primary product source for SAPIEN 3, SAPIEN 3 Ultra, and SAPIEN 3 Ultra RESILIA indications and positioning.

title: HemoSphere Advanced Monitoring Platform
note: Primary product source for HemoSphere monitoring capabilities, sensor and catheter compatibility, and decision-support positioning.

title: Edwards Lifesciences Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for approximate May 2026 market capitalization used in the registry metrics.

title: Edwards Lifesciences Stock Price & Overview
note: Market-data source for current valuation snapshot, including P/E ratio and revenue context.

title: Openwater Developer Documentation
note: Documents Openwater's open-source medical-device ecosystem, Open-Motion platform, public repositories, contribution model, and governance approach.

title: Open-Motion Hemodynamic Platform
note: Describes Open-Motion as a near-infrared hemodynamic platform for blood-flow, blood-volume, and micro-motion measurement using an open-source architecture.

title: FEBio FINESSE: An Open-Source Finite Element Simulation Approach to Estimate In Vivo Heart Valve Strains Using Shape Enforcement
note: Enabler source for open-source heart-valve biomechanics simulation and design-evaluation concepts.

title: Integrated Open-Source Framework for Simulation of Transcatheter Pulmonary Valves in Native Right Ventricular Outflow Tracts
note: Enabler source for open-source simulation workflows around transcatheter pulmonary valve replacement planning and device selection.

title: 3D Printing of Heart Valves
note: Research review used to bound the promise and current limitations of 3D-printed heart valves for decentralized-manufacturing concepts.

title: Open-Source Hardware for Medical Devices
note: Background source on open-source medical-device hardware opportunities, documentation, fabrication, and healthcare-specific challenges.

title: Glia Documentation
note: Open medical hardware documentation source used for cooperative repair, documentation, and open-device ecosystem context.
